response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong alignment with the Staff Software Engineer role, particularly in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical strategy. His current work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators is highly relevant, and his experience with high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby media and Optilyz further validates his technical fit. While his background is broad, his recent focus on AI-native environments and operational ownership makes him a compelling candidate.
strengths: Deep experience with distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (e.g., Dunnhumby media, Optilyz).
Hands-on work with AI-driven engineering environments, including code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq.
Proven stakeholder management and operational ownership across multiple roles, including founder and staff-level positions.
concerns: Breadth of experience may dilute depth in some areas (e.g., TypeScript is present but not emphasized as a primary language).
Limited explicit mention of incident-response or on-call experience, though operational readiness is implied.
No direct evidence of participation in agile ceremonies as a scrum champion or similar role.
